name: xdm_workflow_settings_phase3_overlay
description: Redesigns the Downloads workflow with contextual bulk actions and a resizable details pane, moves secondary actions into focused detail groups, and reorganizes Settings into five categories with a persistent save bar.
commitMessage: Redesign downloads workflow and settings navigation
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms, CoreFx or MSIX targets
Preserve every existing Downloads command and storage-picker workflow
Preserve every existing Settings command, setting binding and storage picker
Keep high contrast, UI scaling, RTL flow direction and keyboard shortcuts functional
Require zero warnings and zero errors
